changes.description: Restore all 11 variants (v5-v11 for glm5.1, v3-v11 for dsv4p)
changes.before: glm5.1=28 deployments (4 variants × 7 keys), dsv4p=14 (2 variants × 7 keys)
changes.evidence: All 22 variants tested directly against ModelScope API on 2026-06-02 — all returned HTTP 200 with valid choices
changes.root_cause: ModelScope non-stream 'delta' field crashes LiteLLM parser (force-stream fix resolves this for ALL variants)

changes.evidence: 5 retries with 77 deployments wastes latency; 3 retries sufficient on larger pool
At rpm=1, rate-limit means definitive quota exhaustion; 3 allowed fails wastes requests
Same reasoning as RateLimitError — more deployments = less tolerance needed
300-window too slow for routing adaptation at rpm=1; shorter window adapts faster
BadRequest is client error, not deployment health indicator
